hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -Eq '>[[:space:]]*[^&[:space:]]' && echo "$cmd" | grep -Eq '\b(cat|tail|head|less|more)\b'; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Redirects output to a file and reads it back with cat/tail/head/less/more. Per CLAUDE.md (Avoid unnecessary file redirects in Bash calls), run the command directly and read its output from the tool result instead — no file, no cat/tail."}}'; else printf '{}'; fi
